user.title: Paste the profile code
user.description: Create and copy a profile code from the SmartIR converter website, then paste it below.

data_description.profile_code: A code beginning with IRP1: generated locally by the converter website.

device.title: Set up the entity
device.description: Choose the Infrared emitter that controls this device. You can also choose an optional receiver to synchronize state when the physical remote is used.

data_description.carrier_frequency: The modulation frequency sent to the IR emitter. Leave it at 38 kHz unless the device requires a different carrier frequency.

reconfigure.title: Update SmartIR Native device
reconfigure.description: View or replace the IRP1 profile code, and change the name, emitter, or optional receiver. The replacement profile must use the same device type.

data_description.profile_code: Paste a complete IRP1 code for the same type of device.
data_description.carrier_frequency: The modulation frequency sent to the IR emitter. Leave it at 38 kHz unless the device requires a different carrier frequency.

error.invalid_profile: The profile code is invalid or unsupported. Generate it again and paste the complete code.
error.profile_type_mismatch: The replacement profile is for a different device type. Add it as a new SmartIR Native device instead.

abort.no_infrared_emitters: No Home Assistant Infrared emitter entity is available.
abort.invalid_profile: The profile setup session expired. Start adding the integration again.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The SmartIR Native device was updated successfully.

init.title: Edit SmartIR Native device
init.description: View or replace the IRP1 profile code and change the emitter or optional receiver. The replacement profile must use the same device type.

data_description.profile_code: Paste a complete IRP1 code for the same type of device.
data_description.carrier_frequency: The modulation frequency sent to the IR emitter. Leave it at 38 kHz unless the device requires a different carrier frequency.

error.invalid_profile: The profile code is invalid or unsupported. Generate it again and paste the complete code.
error.profile_type_mismatch: The replacement profile is for a different device type. Add it as a new SmartIR Native device instead.
